rows.description: Recepta pro hoc Anno ad 2dum Diem Novembris. A.D. 1819.
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash as its description matches visual evidence more accurately regarding capitalization ('Diem' vs 'diem') and punctuation (no comma after 'Anno'). Both extractors agree on row type and lack of monetary values.
rows.section_header: Recepta pro hoc Anno ad 2dum Diem Novembris. A.D. 1819.

rows.notes: All extractors agree on the description, type, and monetary values. Visual verification confirms accuracy.
rows.section_header: Recepta pro hoc Anno ad 2dum Diem Novembris. A.D. 1819.
rows.english_description: Receipts of arrears (sums previously due and now received).

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's description due to correct 'æ' ligature in 'præsentis', which is clearly visible in the image. Monetary values and row type are consistent across both and visually confirmed.
rows.section_header: Recepta pro hoc Anno ad 2dum Diem Novembris. A.D. 1819.
rows.english_description: Receipts for the present year (current-year income).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipts for the present year amounting to £30 0s 0d.

rows.notes: All extractors agree on the description, type, and monetary values. Visual verification confirms accuracy.
rows.section_header: Recepta pro hoc Anno ad 2dum Diem Novembris. A.D. 1819.

rows.notes: Visually verified the pence fraction is clearly 0.75 (3/4), as reported by gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read it as 0.25. gemini-flash also provided a valuable note identifying a calculation discrepancy (previous rows sum to 2754.16.3 1/4, but this row records 2754.16.3 3/4), demonstrating careful analysis.
rows.section_header: Recepta pro hoc Anno ad 2dum Diem Novembris. A.D. 1819.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's description due to correct 'æ' ligature in 'præcedentis', which is clearly visible in the image. Monetary values and row type are consistent across both and visually confirmed.
rows.section_header: Recepta pro hoc Anno ad 2dum Diem Novembris. A.D. 1819.
rows.english_description: Amounts due from the preceding year (debts/arrears carried forward).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Amounts due from the preceding year amounting to £1647 9s ¼d.

rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini's description as 'Receptorum' is visually accurate. Both extractors agree on the monetary values (4402.5.3 1/2). gemini-flash's note is valued for correctly identifying that this total, when calculated from the *visually correct* Row 5 (2754.16.3 3/4) and Row 6 (1647.9.0 1/4), should be 4402.5.4, indicating a discrepancy in the original ledger's handwritten total. The extraction reflects the handwritten value.
rows.section_header: Recepta pro hoc Anno ad 2dum Diem Novembris. A.D. 1819.

rows.notes: All extractors agree on the description, type, and lack of monetary values. Visual verification confirms accuracy.

Selected gemini-flash's description for more accurate transcription of the abbreviated Latin, specifically 'Rectori.', 'Scholar:', and 'Officiari:'. gpt-5-mini indicated ambiguity but provided a less precise transcription. Monetary values and row type are consistent across both and visually confirmed.
rows.english_description: Payments to the rector, the scholars, and the college officers (stipends and allowances).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payments to the rector, scholars, and officers amounting to £700 11s 7d.

rows.notes: All extractors agree on the description, type, and monetary values. Visual verification and arithmetic check confirm accuracy.
rows.english_description: Ordinary routine payments for the college (ordinary expenses).

rows.notes: All extractors agree on the description, type, and monetary values. Visual verification confirms accuracy.
All extractors agree on the description, type, and monetary values. Visual verification and arithmetic check confirm accuracy.

All extractors agree on the description and monetary values. Selected 'entry' for row_type (gemini-flash) as this is an input value for a subsequent calculation, consistent with the definition of an entry. Visual verification confirms accuracy, and both correctly identify this as a reference to the 'Summa Receptorum' total (Row 7).
rows.english_description: Funds drawn from the receipts (money taken from the total receipts to meet payments).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Funds drawn from the receipts amounting to £4402 5s 3½d.

rows.notes: All extractors agree on the description and monetary values. Selected 'entry' for row_type (gemini-flash) as this is an input value for a subsequent calculation. Visual verification confirms accuracy, and both correctly identify this as a reference to the 'Summa Solutorum' total (Row 12).
rows.english_description: Sum of payments deducted (total of amounts paid out).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Sum of payments deducted amounting to £3075 7s 9½d.

rows.notes: All extractors agree on the description, type, and monetary values. Visual verification and arithmetic check (4402.5.3 1/2 - 3075.7.9 1/2 = 1326.17.6) confirm accuracy.
All extractors agree on the description, type, and lack of monetary values. Visual verification confirms accuracy.

Selected gemini-flash for its accurate description (including the final period) and 'entry' row type, as this is a specific signatory, not a general section header. Visual verification confirms the text.
rows.english_description: Account checked and approved by John Collier Jones, Rector (signature).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Account checked and approved by John Collier Jones, Rector.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's description and 'entry' type. Visually, the initial appears to be 'P' and the surname 'Johnson', followed by 'Subrectorem'. While challenging, gemini-flash's reading is more accurate than gpt-5-mini's low-confidence and highly uncertain attempt.
rows.english_description: Account checked and approved by P. Johnson, Sub-rector (signature).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Account checked and approved by P. Johnson, Sub-rector.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's description and 'entry' type. Visual inspection suggests 'I. Rosdew. Decanum.' is a more accurate transcription of the challenging cursive text than gpt-5-mini's highly uncertain reading ('J. ?eaderus').
rows.english_description: Account checked and approved by I. Rosdew, Dean (signature).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Account checked and approved by I. Rosdew, Dean.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's description and 'entry' type. Despite being condensed, 'Tho Smyth Glubb. Burs. Senr.' is a much more accurate reading of the cursive than gpt-5-mini's speculative attempt. Visual verification supports gemini-flash.
rows.english_description: Account checked and approved by Thomas Smyth Glubb, Senior Bursar (signature).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Account checked and approved by Thomas Smyth Glubb, Senior Bursar.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's description and 'entry' type. The reading 'J. V. Heys. Burs. Junr.' aligns more accurately with the visual evidence, specifically the 'V' initial and the punctuation after 'Burs'. gpt-5-mini's alternative reading ('I. Heyes Burs: Junr.') is less precise.
rows.english_description: Account checked and approved by J. V. Heys, Junior Bursar (signature).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Account checked and approved by J. V. Heys, Junior Bursar.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's description and 'entry' type. The initial 'W.' is clearly visible in the image, which gpt-5-mini missed. Visual verification confirms the complete text.
rows.english_description: Account checked and approved by W. Williams, A.M. (signature).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Account checked and approved by W. Williams, A.M.

rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini's description 'Dec: 1.mo 1819.' as 'Dec' (for December) is visually more accurate than gemini-flash's 'Die:'. Used gemini-flash's 'entry' for row_type, as it is a specific date record, not a header. Visual verification confirms the text and date format.
rows.english_description: Dated first of December 1819 (date of verification).
